phases.name: Foundation
exit_criteria: Dummy workflow visible in Web UI

phases.name: Core Workflow Migration
exit_criteria: Agent dispatch runs end-to-end in Temporal
Hatchet CI pipeline triggers from webhook

quality_gates.requirement: All NATS dispatch subjects must be documented before consumer removal
Rollback procedure must be executed and verified in test environment before cutover
Zero discrepancies for 48 hours before NATS workflow logic is deleted

rollback_trigger: SC-007 failure OR >1 discrepancy in WP10 OR any critical workflow failing >5% of runs
rollback_steps: Verify NATS accepts new work within 10 minutes
Monitor for 1 hour before further investigation
